pros: Real-time 10-second GPS updates (not 5 min like competitors)
Listen-In ambient audio for caregiver safety assessment
verdictShort: AngelSense is the only GPS tracker specifically designed and optimized for people with cognitive impairment — the device attaches to clothing with a tamper-resistant clip the wearer cannot easily remove (critical for dementia patients who try to remove devices). Real-time GPS tracking updates every 10 seconds (not every 5 minutes like many competitors), Geofencing alerts notify caregivers immediately when the person leaves home, and two-way calling allows caregivers to speak with their loved one through the device. The 'Listen-In' feature lets caregivers hear ambient audio to assess safety without alerting the person. Specifically designed for situations where the wearer may not cooperate with the safety system.
